auth.password_min: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.password_max: Password must be at most 128 characters.
auth.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
auth.name_max: Name must be at most 128 characters.
auth.surname_min: Surname must be at least 2 characters.
auth.surname_max: Surname must be at most 128 characters.
auth.email_or_phone_required: Email or phone number is required.

common.translations_min: At least one translation is required.
common.slug_pattern: Slug must contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
common.ingress_target_required: Provide at least one canonical host or IP address.
common.duplicate_name_in_locale: Duplicate name in the same language.
common.variant_options_min: At least one option is required.
common.variant_option_values_min: At least one option value is required.
common.variant_option_count_mismatch: Option count does not match the number of variant groups.
common.variant_missing_group_option: Each variant group must have exactly one option selected.
common.variant_unique_key_mismatch: Variant key does not match the selected options.
common.variant_groups_required: At least one variant group is required when variants are enabled.
common.variant_groups_not_allowed: Variant groups are not allowed when variants are disabled.
common.variants_required: At least one variant is required when variants are enabled.
common.variants_not_allowed: Variants are not allowed when variants are disabled.
common.multiple_color_groups: Only one color variant group is allowed.
common.customer_group_rule_tree_required: A rule tree or rule tree ID is required for rule-based groups.
common.customer_group_members_min: At least one member is required.
common.condition_set_min_conditions: At least one condition is required.
common.decision_tree_root_required: A root node is required in the decision tree.
common.decision_tree_nodes_min: At least one node is required in the decision tree.
common.decision_tree_root_not_found: Root node not found in the decision tree.
common.decision_tree_orphan_node: Orphan node detected — not reachable from root.
common.decision_tree_min_conditions: At least two conditions are required in a condition group.
common.decision_tree_simple_multiple_results: Simple mode allows only one result node.
common.decision_tree_simple_no_branch_not_allow: No-branch is not allowed in simple mode.
common.active_stores_required: At least one store must be selected.
common.cost_currency_required: Cost currency is required when cost price is set.
common.compare_at_price_must_be_higher: Compare-at price must be higher than the selling price.
common.source_currency_required_for_exchange_ra: Source currency is required when exchange rate derivation is enabled.
common.source_currency_must_differ_from_default: Source currency must differ from the default currency.
common.date_from_must_be_before_to: End date must be after start date.
common.date_from_cannot_be_in_past: Start date cannot be set in the past.

pricing.assignment_relation_required: A target must be selected for this assignment type.
pricing.assignment_relation_must_be_null: No target should be selected for this assignment type.
pricing.adjustment_type_required_for_relative: Adjustment type is required for relative pricing.
pricing.adjustment_value_required_for_relative: Adjustment value is required for relative pricing.
pricing.max_qty_must_be_gte_min: Maximum quantity must be greater than or equal to minimum quantity.
